title: SARIF AI emit profile — rule reporting descriptor object
description: Input contract for a SARIF reportingDescriptor an AI producer supplies to the add-rule-reporting-descriptor verb, stored under run.tool.driver.rules[]. The id must match the NOVEL- escape-hatch grammar (NOVEL- followed by a lowercase-alphanumeric kebab sub-id, single hyphens, no slash, no leading/trailing/consecutive hyphen), the same grammar a result's NOVEL- ruleId satisfies, so the descriptor id matches the ruleId that references it. Taxonomy-mapped rule descriptors (e.g. CWE-89) come from the finalize-time taxonomy enricher, not this verb.

id.description: Rule descriptor id (SARIF §3.49.3): NOVEL- plus a lowercase-alphanumeric kebab sub-id (single hyphens, no slash, no trailing hyphen). 'NOVEL-prompt-injection' is accepted; bare 'NOVEL-', 'NOVEL-foo/bar', and 'NOVEL-Upper' are rejected.
